---
title: "CODEX_Nathalie_test_1_analysis"
author: "Paul Marcoux"
date: today
date-format: "DD MM YYYY"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    code-tools: true
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: false
  column: page
jupyter: sopa
---

# Analysis of the CODEX data from Nathalie Test_1

## Configuration and package loading

```{python}
```

```{r Env}
library(reticulate)
use_condaenv("sopa", required = TRUE)
```
Import Package
```{python Import}
#| echo: true
# import the python packages
import scanpy as sc
import spatialdata as sd
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import h5py
import anndata as ad
import spatialdata_io as sio
import spatialdata_plot
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import warnings
import os
import squidpy as sq

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
```

Read Data

```{python}
#| echo: true
adata_all = sc.read_h5ad("/home/paul.marcoux/Postdoc/Python/sopa/workflow/data/Nathalie_test/processed/adata_merged_leiden_0_5.h5ad")
```

## Graphs

### Umap of unsupervised leiden clustering with resolution 0.5

```{python}
# Plot Umap
sc.pl.umap(adata_all, color = 'leiden')
```

### Leiden Clustering projection on slide ROI

```{python}
for sample_name in adata_all.obs["sample"].unique():
    subset = adata_all[adata_all.obs["sample"] == sample_name]
    sc.pl.embedding(
        subset,
        basis="spatial",
        color="leiden",
        title=sample_name,
        show=False,
        size=1.5,
    )
```
```{python}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
marker_list_heatmap_new = [
    # T cells
    'CD3e', 'CD4', 'CD8', 'CD45RO', 'TCF-1', 'CD45',

    # Activation / Exhaustion
    'LAG3', 'TOX', 'CD39',

    # Treg
    'FOXP3', 'CD38',

    # Tfh
    'PD-1', 'ICOS',

    # NK
    'CD56', 'CD57', 'Granzyme B',

    # B cells
    'CD20', 'CD79a', 'Bcl-2', 'CD21',
    'Ki67',

    # Myeloid / Macrophages / DC
    'CD11b', 'CD11c', 'CD68', 'CD163',
    'CD14', 'CD66', 'MPO',          # Neutrophils/Monocytes
    'CD206', 'CD209',               # DC / M2 macrophages
    'IDO1', 'iNOS',                 # Macrophage functional markers

    # Immune checkpoints / Immunomodulation
    'PD-L1', 'VISTA', 'HLA-DR', 'HLA-A',

    # Stromal / Endothelial
    'CD31', 'CD34', 'Collagen IV', 'Podoplanin',
    'SMA', 'Vimentin', 'Caveolin',  # Fibroblast / stromal

    # Epithelial / Tumor
    'Pan-Cytokeratin', 'EpCAM',
    'Keratin 14', 'Keratin 5', 
    # 'Keratin 8/18',  # Epithelial subtypes
    'E-cadherin', 'b-Catenin1',                 # Epithelial / EMT
    'TP63', 'SOX2',                             # Epithelial TF
    'GP100', 'ER',                              # Tumor specific (melanoma / breast)

    # Proliferation / Cell cycle
    'PCNA', 'Ki67', 'Histone H3 (p Ser28)',

    # Other / Unclassified
    'CD44',     # Activation / stemness
    'CD107a',   # Degranulation (NK/CTL)
    'IFNG',     # Cytokine
    'Beta-actin',  # Housekeeping

    # Nuclear / Structural (typically excluded from biological analysis)
    # 'DAPI',
]
```
```{python}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
sc.pl.matrixplot(
    adata_all,
    groupby="leiden",
    var_names=marker_list_heatmap_new,
    cmap="RdYlBu_r",
    swap_axes=False,
    use_raw=False,       # or True if you want raw counts
    standard_scale="var", # optional: scale across genes
    colorbar_title="",   # Remove colorbar title
    show=True,          # Don't show immediately
)
```
